assertionResults.fullName: DiscoveryGrid filters agents by projects array when activeProject is set

assertionResults.fullName: DiscoveryGrid renders fallback cards when no items match filters
assertionResults.title: renders fallback cards when no items match filters

assertionResults.fullName: DiscoveryGrid filters items using combined Domain and Tech filters (OR logic)
assertionResults.title: filters items using combined Domain and Tech filters (OR logic)

assertionResults.title: calls setProject when Layers icon is clicked on a prototype

assertionResults.fullName: DiscoveryGrid does not render Layers icon for agent cards
assertionResults.title: does not render Layers icon for agent cards

assertionResults.fullName: DiscoveryGrid shows truly shared agents in Browse Mode but hides them in Focus Mode
assertionResults.title: shows truly shared agents in Browse Mode but hides them in Focus Mode

assertionResults.fullName: DiscoveryGrid requires agents to match BOTH project AND domain/tech when both filters are active
assertionResults.title: requires agents to match BOTH project AND domain/tech when both filters are active

assertionResults.fullName: DiscoveryGrid shows agents matching both active project and active domain

assertionResults.title: does not render overview icon for agent cards
